title: Halleck

{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''Halleck'', this is General Windu. This is a priority clear-call, initiation code oh six one five. Acknowledge.|Mace Windu contacts the ''Halleck''|<ref name="SP" />}}
The '''''Halleck''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] in service with the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was assigned to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] during a [[Battle of Haruun Kal/Legends|mission]] to rescue his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan learner]] [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. The [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] came under heavy attack when it proceeded to Haruun Kal to extract Windu, and was forced to retreat into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and return to [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] territory.

==Description==
A [[Rothana Heavy Engineering/Legends|Rothana]] [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]]<ref name="TNEC" /> of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]], the ''Halleck'' was equipped with twenty [[Jadthu-class landing ship/Legends|''Jadthu''-class landing ships]], five [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]] and six<ref name="SP" /> [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class interceptors]].<ref name="TNEC" />

==History==
{{Quote|Once the landers are away, you will withdraw. Do you copy? This is a direct order. When the landers are away, the ''Halleck'' will jump for Republic space.|Mace Windu orders Commander Urhal to get the ''Halleck'' away from Haruun Kal|<ref name="SP" />}}
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="SP" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC" /> the ''Halleck'' was assigned to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] for Windu's [[Battle of Haruun Kal/Legends|mission]] to track down and rescue his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Depa Billaba/Legends|Depa Billaba]] on the<ref name="SP" /> [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. Stationed in the [[Ventran system/Legends|Ventran system]] while Windu went on to Haruun Kal alone, the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was duly summoned by Windu to commence extraction after he successfully acquired Billaba. The ''Halleck'' moved in and deployed a ''Jadthu''-class landing ship to rescue Windu, but was intercepted by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]] that had lain in wait in a nearby [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]].<ref name="SP" />

The droid fighters launched their ambush, first destroying the extraction lander and then swarming the ''Halleck'' proper. One fighter rammed the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] and, with the ship's [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Trent (Republic Navy officer)|Trent]], badly injured and its [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] escort obliterated, the ''Halleck'' began sustaining major damage. Its [[Commander/Legends|commander]], [[Urhal]], took charge and received an order from Master Windu to undock the landers and send them to Haruun Kal's surface. Despite Urhal's reservations due to the fact that the landers had no [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]] and could not escape the [[Star system/Legends|system]] with Windu without a [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]] ship, the commander ordered the landers to deploy and had the ''Halleck'' jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and the safety of [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] territory.<ref name="SP" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Halleck'' first appeared in [[Matthew Stover]]'s [[2003]] novel [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]. Described as a "Republic medium cruiser" in the novel,<ref name="SP" /> the ship was established as being an ''Acclamator''-class assault ship in the [[2005]] reference book ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.<ref name="TNEC" /> The entry for the ''Halleck'' in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' incorrectly states that the ship inserted Windu onto Haruun Kal, and that it was attacked by several Separatist [[Warship/Legends|warships]] and destroyed shortly after.<ref name="Wrong">{{CSWECite|II|9|Halleck}}</ref>
